# Security Report (DO NOT DISCLOSE PUBLICLY)

⚠️ **IMPORTANT**  
Do not include exploit code, payloads, or sensitive vulnerability details here.

This repository follows responsible disclosure.

---

## What to Do Instead

Please report security vulnerabilities privately.

See: `SECURITY.md`

Email:
- security@aic.example *(replace later)*

---

## Minimal Information (Safe to Share)
If you must create an issue, only include:

- affected module name
- high-level description (no technical exploit details)
- impact category (DoS / data corruption / memory safety)

---

## Example Safe Description

"Possible memory safety issue in telemetry parsing under malformed JSON input."

---

## Maintainer Note
Maintainers will close this issue and request private disclosure.
